title: Snacks like Coffee Crisp and ketchup chips are only available in Canada, but they have fans around the world
snippet: Ketchup chips and All Dressed Ruffles may only be available on Canadian store shelves, but they travel the world through popular viral videos.
reason: The title mentions 'potato chips' and the snippet talks about specific brands available in Canada that travel the world, which is related to potato chip news.
